description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image, defines a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache, and caches the .cache/pip directory. Include a before_script that runs python -V and pip install pyflakes. Add a test job (running in the default test stage) that executes pyflakes main.py. The pipeline has no special rules, artifacts, or deployment targets.
